title: Hook kind: custom-script
description: Escape-hatch kind per DEC-024: runs an adopter-supplied script after the primary lifecycle operation. The kit hands the script a fixed env-var envelope: PKIT_HOOK_EVENT, PKIT_ISSUE_NUMBER (or PKIT_PR_NUMBER), PKIT_REPO, PKIT_HOOK_REPLAY, PKIT_DRY_RUN. The script returns 0 on success; non-zero causes report-and-continue per the failure semantics. Idempotency is the script's responsibility — PKIT_HOOK_REPLAY=true signals re-fire so the script can short-circuit.

script_path.description: Path to the script, relative to the capability root (e.g., `project/hook-scripts/notify-slack.sh`). Must live under `project/` (adopter-owned per the no-shared-files invariant). Must be executable; pre-check verifies.

timeout_seconds.description: Wall-clock timeout for the script. Default 30s. Engine kills the script and records a timeout failure if exceeded.
